title: melica smithii
intro: Melica smithii, also known as Melica ciliata or Melica smithii, is a type of grass native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Melica smithii include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Melica smithii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
